description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa has three individual backrest cushions and two seat cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. Two decorative throw pillows, one in mustard yellow and the other in a black-and-white houndstooth pattern, add visual interest and contrast to the otherwise monochromatic palette. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on six slender, black metal legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a light and elevated appearance. The back and sides are fully upholstered in the same gray fabric, with no visible seams or decorative elements.
description: A modern light gray three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and slim black metal legs. Includes two decorative throw pillows in mustard yellow and black-and-white houndstooth.
description_view_0: Front view showing three backrest cushions, two seat cushions, and two decorative throw pillows on the left and right sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's straight armrest, slim black legs, and the placement of the throw pillows against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous gray upholstery and the boxy, seamless back profile with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight armrest, slim black legs, and the arrangement of the throw pillows from the opposite angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose backrest cushions and two loose seat cushions, all uniform in size; two decorative throw pillows placed at opposite ends.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at medium height, matching the backrest height, fully upholstered in gray fabric with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and near the center for support; legs are straight, exposed, and slightly recessed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest with three individual loose cushions, no tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns or decorative stitching on the main upholstery, with patterned and solid throw pillows for accent.
